title: Craft and delight are system properties
summary: Performance, reliability, security, accessibility, feedback, and visual expression jointly create trust and emotion.
guidance: Name the intended feeling, then verify every state supports it; novelty cannot compensate for poor system behavior.
do: Review quality across happy, failure, and recovery states
Tune a few meaningful moments with representative content
dont: Add confetti, motion, or decorative novelty as a substitute for consideration
verification: journey-level craft, performance, accessibility, and emotion review
